question: Will CPI rise more than 0.9% in March 2026?
reasoning: The March 2026 CPI data has already been released today (April 10, 2026) by the Bureau of Labor Statistics. Multiple reliable sources confirm that CPI increased by 0.3% on a seasonally adjusted basis in March 2026, which is significantly below the 0.9% threshold required for a YES resolution. Since the actual data shows 0.3% < 0.9%, the market must resolve to NO with 100% certainty.
key_factors: Official BLS data released showing 0.3% March CPI increase
Data is final and official from government source
risks: No meaningful risks - official data is already released and conclusive
